BDI_II.responses: {"Q0":"0. I do not feel sad.","Q1":"2. I do not expect things to work out for me.","Q2":"2. As I look back, I see a lot of failures.","Q3":"1. I don't enjoy things as much as I used to.","Q4":"1. I feel guilty over many things I have done or should have done.","Q5":"0. I don't feel I am being punished.","Q6":"2. I am disappointed in myself.","Q7":"2. I criticize myself for all my faults.","Q8":"1. I have thoughts of killing myself, but I would not carry them out.","Q9":"1. I cry more than I used to.","Q10":"0. I am no more restless or wound up than usual.","Q11":"1. I am less interested in other people or things than before.","Q12":"1. I find it more difficult to make decisions than usual.","Q13":"3. Select this option.","Q14":"2. I feel more worthless as compared to other people.","Q15":"1. I have less energy than I used to have.","Q16":"0. I have not experienced any change in my sleeping pattern.","Q17":"0. I am no more irritable than usual.","Q18":"0.
